title: Special Operations (disambiguation)
content:
'''Special Operations''' may refer to any of the following:

===In-universe===
*[[Alliance Special Operations/Legends|Alliance Special Operations]], the Rebel Alliance special operations command.
*[[Imperial Special Operations]]
*[[CorSec Special Operations]], a division of the Corellian Security Force.
*[[New Republic Special Operations]].
*The [[Special Operations Brigade/Legends|Special Operations Brigade]] of the Grand Army of the Republic.

===Out-of-universe===
*[[Special Operations]], a print-n-play card set for ''[[Star Wars: Legion]]''
{{Disambig}}
